channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: US attacks Iran as IRGC claims strikes on US military sites in Gulf
item.description: Oil prices rise as the US renews a blockade on Iranian ports and carries out a wave of air strikes.

item.title: Lindsey Graham’s sister sworn in to fill his US Senate seat
item.description: Lindsey Graham’s sister sworn in to fill his US Senate seat

item.title: Photos: France fireworks fade as Spain march into World Cup final
item.description: France’s free-scoring World Cup run ends in 2-0 loss to Spain, denting Mbappe’s hopes of a third final.

item.title: India’s ethanol rush prompts anger among vehicle owners, questions for gov’t
item.description: Indian petrol stations now only offer fuel with 20 percent ethanol blended in. But the rushed move triggers criticism.

item.title: Spain recapture 2010 spirit after reaching World Cup final: De la Fuente
item.description: After a masterclass against France in the semifinals, Spain are just one win from winning their second World Cup.

item.title: Waiting for Hassan: Another Gaza doctor held by Israel without charge
item.description: Hassan Khalil Almukayed is among at least 15 Palestinian doctors from Gaza currently in Israeli detention.

item.title: How the failed 2016 coup reshaped Turkiye’s civil-military relations
item.description: Takeover bid 10 years ago sped up efforts to expand civilian oversight, experts say, reducing chances of another coup.

item.title: England vs Argentina: FIFA World Cup semifinal – Messi, Kane and prediction
item.description: England and Argentina renew their World Cup rivalry after 24 years, as Harry Kane and Lionel Messi clash in the semis.

item.title: World Cup: England have ‘not peaked yet’, says Tuchel before semifinal
item.description: England face Argentina in Wednesday's semifinal, hoping to reach the World Cup final for the first time since 1966.

item.title: How Iran’s southern coast is bearing the brunt of US attacks
item.description: Donald Trump says the US is going to bomb Iran’s civilian infrastructure if there is no deal by next week.

item.title: Spain knock out France, prepare for World Cup final
item.description: Spain beat France 2-0 to reach the World Cup final, shutting down Kylian Mbappe

item.title: T.Rex skeleton sells for $50.1 million at New York auction
item.description: A T.Rex skeleton nicknamed ‘Gus’ sold for a record $50 million at an auction in New York.

item.title: Saving shea: How a Ugandan woman is turning waste into clean energy
item.description: As demand for charcoal threatens indigenous trees, communities are finding new value in what was once treated as waste.

item.title: Nearly 75% of Americans think there’s too much money in politics
item.description: The US is set to have some of the most expensive elections in history.

item.title: Trump welcomes Iraqi PM to White House, vows ‘a lot of deals’
item.description: US President Donald Trump and Iraqi PM Ali al-Zaidi have met at the White House pledging to deepen economic ties.

item.title: Argentina happy to be in World Cup semifinal, coach Scaloni says
item.description: Argentina are 'in good shape' and have no concerns over fatigue as the world champions look to book another final.

item.title: Mbappe blames technical, tactical blunders for World Cup semifinal loss
item.description: France striker admits Spain controlled the game and made them pay for errors in the semifinal in Dallas.

item.title: Spain crashes Paris party by beating France in the World Cup semis
item.description: Dreams of reaching the World Cup final for a third time running were dashed when France were beaten 2-0 by Spain.

item.title: US star Balogun knew red card reversal would ‘cause a lot of controversy’
item.description: Striker says FIFA's decision to suspend his one-match ban led to 'a lot of outside noise' before USA's knockout match.

item.title: Spain fans erupt as team reaches World Cup final
item.description: Fans erupted in celebration after Spain beat France 2-0 in the semifinals, securing their place in the 2026 Finals

item.title: Iran war live: At least 30 civilians killed in recent US air strikes
item.description: US missile barrage on southern Iran kills 7 Iranian soldiers as Trump vows to intensify attacks.

item.title: Outspoken Moroccan rapper Mehdi El Youbi arrested in Casablanca
item.description: Activists say Moroccan authorities are intensifying repression of critical voices and the Gen Z protest movement.

item.title: Colombian father identified in deadly ICE shooting
item.description: Colombian father identified in deadly ICE shooting

item.title: Spain deliver masterclass to beat France 2-0 and reach World Cup final
item.description: European champions Spain beat France with controlled display to book final against Argentina or England.

item.title: Are countries prepared to cope with extreme weather?
item.description: Severe weather conditions are likely to get worse due to climate change.
